title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, argues that ad-based monetization is more viable than subscription models for AI tools and that the real bottleneck for AI agents is human trust rather than technology. He shares insights on decision-making under uncertainty drawn from his background in competitive sailing.
